title: CONCILIATION SERVICES - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY JUVENILE DEPARTMENT CONCILIATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides court-mandated and voluntary mediation services to assist couples in reaching an agreement about custody and parenting time before a court hearing. Also offers co-parenting education and counseling. 222 N 1st Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: -Court mandated Mediation and Parent Education: Parties with minor children who have a pending domestic relations case in Washington County -Voluntary Mediation: Parties with minor children who do not have a pending domestic relations case in Washington County -All other services: Parties with minor children Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 846-3428 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-3428 Administration (503) 846-3812 Griselda Izquierdo [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: -Court mandated Mediation and Parent Education: $200 per person, fee is waived for those who have received a waiver or deferral of their court fees. -New Ways for Families: $250 per person or $150 for those who have received a waiver or deferral of their court fees. -Voluntary Mediation: $125 per person per session -Counseling: $93.75 per person per session DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Divorce Counseling Marriage and Relationships Counseling Mediation * Divorce/Custody/Support Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY JUVENILE DEPARTMENT
